title: agrostis stolonifera var. hispanica
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. hispanica, also known as Spanish bent or crested hair grass, is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. hispanica include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Agrostis stolonifera var. hispanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
